replies.msg: 挽咗一次 人地唔受就唔會再挽

My friend Paul is a Virgo whereas his wife is a Scorpio. Recently, he married Clara, his girlfriend from CMB. A pastor married them at a cathedral. I said "wishing you a lifetime of love and happiness!" My brother wrote "Best wishes on this wonderful journey as you build your new lives together!" My elder sister said "Thank you for letting me share in this joyful day! I wish you all the best as you embark on this wonderful union!" My younger sis said "Congratulations on finding each other! Your greatest adventure has just begun!" My cousin said "Wishing you fulfillment of every dream!" Yesterday I went to their place and saw them. Paul and I met at a midway point between my place and his then he took me to the bus bound for his place. The bus queue was so long stretching down the road to the furthest mini bus stop. We queued for half an hour til three shuttle buses came along at once. In the meantime, some people mistook this huge queue for the queue for other places. A couple came up to us and asked "are you in the queue for Cluny Park?" as they want to ensure that it's the right queue. A stout guy pushed in at the head of the queue but people ignored it. Later a slender lady jumped the queue. The guy behind her said "excuse me. The end of the queue is back there" A woman stood beside a man who was midway through the queue. While pretending to look at her phone she edged furtively behind him who didn't realise she was there. Some people might have noticed it but ignored it.

replies.msg: My friend Lucy is a Virgo whereas her husband John is a Scorpio. Last week she married him, her boyfriend from Tinder. A pastor married them at Rosewood Hotel. I said "Wishing you a lifetime of love and happiness!" My elder brother said "Best wishes on this wonderful journey as you build your new lives together!" My younger brother wrote "Thank you for letting me share in this joyful day! I wish you all the best as you embark on this wonderful union!" My sister wrote "Congratulations on finding each other! Your greatest adventure has just begun!" My cousin said "Wishing you fulfilment of every dream!" Lucy is a fine trumpeter. I complimented her on her trumpet skills. She then said "Yes what can I say?" She's late because she's missed the bus. I asked "How on earth did you miss the bus?" She said "I'm sorry. What can I say?" The current situation is very bad. I said "Well yes what can I say?" Yesterday I was shocked when I saw a car crash on the street. Lucy said "I can imagine." Her boyfriend too said "I'm sure you were." My friend Joe has broken up with his girlfriend lately so he's really down. When I told my brother about it, he said "I'm sure he is." My cousin too said "I can imagine." To those of you who have broken up and haven't found new love: Keep your chin up! You might find it worth your while to read "Men are from mars women venus" written by John Gray. He's a relationship expert whose work elaborates the keys to a successful long term relationship. I was reluctant to read it at first as I'm not an avid reader but it turned out to be worth my while as I've learnt loads about how men and women think differently. Many successful couples say this international bestseller is worth its weight in gold. You can also find a social worker, for what it's worth.

Do you really believe in horoscope? What zodiac sign are you? To me, the personality description at times seems correct but I don't believe in the foretelling. I'm a Virgo. Please tell me about the disposition and personality traits that are typical of a Virgo because I would like to see if they're accurate. By the way have you heard of zen meditation? I hear lots of people practise it in pursuit of tranquility and happiness. My friend Eddie has been having a crush on this girl named Judy for seven years. He's still holding out false hope that one day he'll become her boyfriend but Judy has a boyfriend. He just being a doormat. During their trip to Thailand Eddie bought lots of presents and keepsakes for her and paid for her meals but at the end he ran out of money so he had to ask Judy to lend him some money who's now saying he's staying close to her to take advantage of her and her money. They stayed in a twin room which has a pair of twin beds rather than a double bed. She told Eddie that she wouldn't sleep with any guy until she was married which we all know isn't true. She sleeps with her real boyfriend daily. Eddie knew it wasn't true but didn't mind. She even said to Eddie twice that she was a bit attracted to him which gave him false hope. That's why he's still holding out false hope that very soon  he'll become her boyfriend. Another girl who he fancied named Susan took him to a beauty parlour and sold him facial sessions for over twelve thousand dollars. He didn't know he was being taken advantage of until he made his payment on his credit card. As soon as he made the payment Susan's whole manner changed. Her expression immediately looked different because she got what she wanted already. She pretended to be cute and said "we can do facial together sweetie..." then he got persuaded. He got rejected by so many girls maybe due to the fact that he has no qualifications whatsoever so he ended up working as a security guard in a residential building with little career prospect and that he's so thin; 180 centimetres tall but weighs less than 110 pounds. He fancied my sister but she avoided him. He studied higher diploma in Australia but besides IT he failed all the exams and failed them again in his resits so he couldn't apply for a student visa again. He ended up working as a security guard in a residential building whose salary is twelve thousand dollars a month. Recently he said he wanted to take a shot at the CPA exam and become an accountant with better career prospects. It'll improve his job prospects but the next day he said it would be a waste of time if he failed it so he gave up. The problem is he doesn't want to step out of his comfort zone; he'd rather be an ordinary security guard for the rest of his life. In addition, he's extremely thin; he's 180 centimetres tall but weighs less than 110 pounds. I suggested that he gain weight but he didn't listen. I tried to encourage him but to no effect. Judy and Susan must have swept him off his feet many years ago.
